title: ToolPermissionGrant
description: A single declarative authorization grant. A grants file is a JSON array of these.

grant_id.description: Stable identifier; reused across replay. Revoking and re-granting MUST use a new id.

agent_id.description: Opaque agent identity (e.g. mission-id, profile name).

tool.description: Tool name as the host knows it. No wildcards; one grant per tool.

scopes.description: Scopes granted (e.g. read, write, network, fs.tmp).

max_calls.description: Hard upper bound on allowed invocations under this grant.

arg_allow.description: Optional per-arg allowlist; request must supply each listed field with one of the listed values.

revoked.description: Sticky bit. Once true, every decision is deny(reason=revoked).
